_metadata.author: Crish Nagarkar
_metadata.description: AILES RAG Retrieval Benchmark v2 — widened with Phase-2 grading data. canonical_chunks = Grade-3 primary authorities (verified). acceptable_chunks = Grade-2 alternatives drawn from top-5 retrieved chunks that supported a CORRECT or PARTIAL verdict.

schema.canonical_chunks: Grade-3 primary authorities; recall@k should count these.
schema.must_not_retrieve_prefixes: Per-query list of chunk_id prefixes that must NOT appear in top-k (precision/negative test).
schema.coverage: When set, a 'covered' retrieval must include at least one chunk from each named concept's any_of list.
schema.judge_rubric: One-sentence falsifiable description of a Grade-3 retrieval.

_metadata.verification: Every chunk_id in canonical_chunks and acceptable_chunks was verified against merged_all_chunks.json. IDs that could not be verified are recorded in unverified_chunks.json.
notes: Judgment chunk_ids are stored at document level (no -para_N suffix); verification checks whether any paragraph-level chunk_id has that document prefix.
PLAIN_04 was graded INCORRECT in Phase 2 — no retrieved chunks were added to its acceptable_chunks; only the original canonical_chunks remain as targets.

queries.query: What factors must the court consider when deciding financial provision on divorce?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.25 (the statutory factors) and at least one judgment applying s.25(2) in a financial remedy context.

queries.query: What periodical payments and spousal maintenance would a court award where total matrimonial assets are approximately £750,000?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.23 / s.25 / s.25A / s.28 plus a judgment quantifying spousal periodical payments on mid-range assets.

queries.query: How does the court recognise non-financial contributions of a homemaker spouse under Section 25(2)(f) of the Matrimonial Causes Act 1973?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.25(2)(f) explicitly and a judgment where the court weighed homemaker contributions.

queries.query: When is conduct relevant in financial remedy proceedings, particularly where a party has dissipated assets or failed to make disclosure?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves OG v AG [2020] EWFC 52 (Mostyn J's four categories of conduct) and MCA 1973 s.25(2)(g) and/or s.37.

queries.query: When should the court impose a clean break and terminate financial obligations between former spouses after divorce?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.25A (clean-break duty) plus a judgment (e.g. Miller/McFarlane lineage) applying it.

queries.query: Can the court treat assets held in a family trust as a financial resource available to a spouse under Section 25?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.25 and a judgment (Charman, Whaley, Thomas v Thomas or Haya v Mohammed) treating trust assets as a resource.

queries.query: How should inherited or pre-marital non-matrimonial assets be treated in financial remedy proceedings?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.25(2)(a) and a judgment (White v White / K v L lineage) distinguishing matrimonial from non-matrimonial property.

queries.query: What are the provisions for pension sharing and pension attachment orders on divorce?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves at least one pension-sharing section (MCA 1973 s.24B / s.21A / s.24E) AND at least one pension-attachment section (s.25B / s.25C / s.25D).

queries.query: What is the welfare checklist and paramountcy principle under the Children Act 1989?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves CA 1989 s.1 (paramountcy) and at least one s.1(3) sub-paragraph of the welfare checklist.

queries.query: How does the court assess the wishes and feelings of a child who refuses contact with a parent due to alleged emotional abuse?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves CA 1989 s.1(3)(a) (wishes and feelings) and a judgment weighing a child's stated wishes in an abuse context.

queries.query: What are the grounds for granting a non-molestation order or occupation order under the Family Law Act 1996?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves FLA 1996 s.33 (occupation) and s.42 (non-molestation), with at least one judgment applying them.

queries.query: What provision can a dependant claim from a deceased person's estate under the Inheritance (Provision for Family and Dependants) Act 1975?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves I(PFD)A 1975 s.1 (applicants) and s.3 (reasonable-provision matters), plus s.2 (orders) or a dependant-claim judgment.

queries.query: My husband earns £100k and I stayed home with the kids for 15 years. What am I entitled to in the divorce?
queries.judge_rubric: Maps the plain-English query to MCA 1973 s.25 factors and s.23 orders.

queries.query: I think my wife is hiding money and assets. What can the court do about it?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.37 (dispositions to defeat claims) and/or s.25(2)(g), and a non-disclosure judgment (Akhmedova lineage).

queries.query: My ex wants to take our daughter to live in another country. Can I stop him?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves CA 1989 s.1 and either CA 1984 s.1 or a child-relocation / prohibited-steps judgment.

queries.query: My partner is violent and I need him out of the house. What legal options do I have?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves FLA 1996 s.33 (occupation) AND s.42 (non-molestation) AND DAA 2021 s.1 (definition of abuse).

queries.query: My father died and left everything to his new wife. I have a disability and was financially dependent on him. Can I challenge the will?
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves I(PFD)A 1975 s.1 (eligible applicants incl. adult children) and s.3 (matters relevant to reasonable provision).

queries.query: What are the tax implications of cryptocurrency trading gains in the UK?
queries.judge_rubric: Returns no UK family-law chunk above the configured relevance threshold (cryptocurrency tax is out of scope).

queries.query: What are the grounds for divorce under California community property law?
queries.judge_rubric: Returns no English family-law chunk above the configured relevance threshold (California divorce law is out of scope); in particular, MCA 1973 must not appear as a top result.

queries.query: Wife, primary carer, no income, 15-year marriage, husband earns £180k as company director, family home £850k with £200k mortgage, husband's business worth £2.5m, two children ages 12 and 14, wife needs housing.
queries.judge_rubric: Retrieves MCA 1973 s.25 (full + 2(a),(b),(f)) and s.23/s.24 (orders), plus at least one judgment on needs-based distribution with children.
